{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322014047D8D879958E6D90C063E3"}"},"total":452},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593793792038404888","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个平台极少数题材融合的挺不错的小说，就是简介可以改一下，不太属于暴爽类型。剧情设计的总体还算可以，主打一个不吃瘪，除了升仙那段基本没有人前显圣的剧情，基本都是靠设计去除掉超高战力角色。暂时无女主，不赖。","text_exts":[{"e":72,"s":68,"text":"人前显圣","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E5%89%8D%E6%98%BE%E5%9C%A3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177411484790C063E3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593793792038404888%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227531405242424888345%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E5%89%8D%E6%98%BE%E5%9C%A3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768072125,"group_id":"7531405242424888345","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N43a7A5B4fEXbNY2AeArPCUM1xAtEu7e+K7A9wQVhecK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7cdb83e4a165435798584dc54538c94c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704188&x-signature=SKNbcVAYj0Lq8tZU8jB0YdLRfXw%3D","user_id":"3107658323207817","user_name":"非云非月非鹤🦖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3107658323207817","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7531405242424888345","book_info":{"abstract":"【吐槽】+【暴爽】+【多世界】+【有系统】
陆平穿越进女频世界，发现女频的女主们却有一些不对劲。
说好要独立自主让渣男后悔，结果还是靠另外一个男人，你说你是大女主？
重生前扶持人被背刺，重生后不当女帝而是换个人扶持，你说你是大女主？
送正统王子出去和亲，你说你是大女主？
一路靠男主保驾护航实现自己事业，你说你是大女主？
只知道谈恋爱靠舔狗帮忙，你说你是大女主？
陆平看着这乱七八糟的剧本无奈叹息。
